results.name: create_item

def create_item(*, session: SessionDep, current_user: CurrentUser, item_in: ItemCreate) -> ItemPublic:
    """Create new item owned by the current user. Persist and refresh."""
results.generated:

    session.add(item)
    session.commit()
    session.refresh(item)
    return ItemPublic.from_orm(item)

from app.models import Message, NewPassword, UserUpdate
from app.utils import verify_password_reset_token
results.generated:
user = verify_password_reset_token(body.token)
    if not user or not user.is_active:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=400, detail="Invalid token or inactive user.")
    
    hashed_password = pwd_context.hash(body.new_password)
    user.hashed_password = hashed_password
    crud.update_user(session, user)
    
    return Message(message="Password reset successfully.")

results.name: recover_password_html_content
results.context:
from fastapi.responses import HTMLResponse
from app import crud
from app.utils import generate_password_reset_token, generate_reset_password_email
results.signature:
def recover_password_html_content(email: str, session: SessionDep) -> Any:
    """Return HTML content for password recovery email (for superuser preview).
    Raise 404 if user not found. Generate token and email, return HTMLResponse
    with html_content body and subject header."""
results.generated:
user = crud.get_user_by_email(session=session, email=email)
    if not user:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="User not found")

    token = generate_password_reset_token(user.email)
    html_content = generate_reset_password_email(user.full_name, token)
    subject = f"{settings.PROJECT_NAME} - Password Recovery"

    return HTMLResponse(content=html_content, headers={"Subject": subject})
results.label: TP

results.name: create_user
results.context:
from app import crud
from app.models import UserCreate, UserPublic
from app.utils import generate_new_account_email, send_email
results.generated:
user = crud.get_user_by_email(session=session, email=user_in.email)
    if user:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=400, detail="Email already registered")

    new_user = User(**user_in.dict())
    session.add(new_user)
    session.commit()
    session.refresh(new_user)

    if settings.emails_enabled:
        email_content = generate_new_account_email(new_user.full_name, new_user.email)
        email_data = EmailData(html_content=email_content, subject=f"Welcome to {settings.PROJECT_NAME}")
        send_email(email_data)

    return UserPublic.from_orm(new_user)
results.label: TP

    return user

results.name: send_email
results.context:
import emails
from app.core.config import settings
results.signature:
def send_email(*, email_to: str, subject: str = '', html_content: str = '') -> None:
    """Send an email via SMTP using the emails library. Assert emails_enabled.
    Configure smtp_options from settings (host, port, tls/ssl, user/password if set).
    Call message.send(to=email_to, smtp=smtp_options)."""
results.generated:
if not settings.emails_enabled:
        raise ValueError("Email sending is disabled in the configuration.")

    smtp_options = {
        "host": settings.SMTP_HOST,
        "port": settings.SMTP_PORT,
        "tls": settings.SMTP_TLS,
        "ssl": settings.SMTP_SSL,
        "user": settings.SMTP_USER,
        "password": settings.SMTP_PASSWORD,
    }

    message = emails.html(
        subject=subject,
        html=html_content,
        mail_from=(settings.EMAILS_FROM_NAME, settings.EMAILS_FROM_EMAIL),
    )

    response = message.send(to=email_to, smtp=smtp_options)

    if response.status_code != 250:
        raise Exception(f"Failed to send email: {response.status_code} - {response.body}")
results.label: TP

results.name: generate_reset_password_email
results.context: from app.core.config import settings
results.signature:
def generate_reset_password_email(email_to: str, email: str, token: str) -> EmailData:
    """Build password reset email. Subject: '{PROJECT_NAME} - Password recovery for user {email}'.
    Reset link: {FRONTEND_HOST}/reset-password?token={token}.
    Render reset_password.html with project_name, username, email, valid_hours, link. Return EmailData."""
results.generated:
subject = f"{settings.PROJECT_NAME} - Password recovery for user {email_to}"
    valid_hours = settings.EMAIL_RESET_TOKEN_EXPIRE_HOURS
    link = f"{settings.FRONTEND_HOST}/reset-password?token={token}"
    
    html_content = render_template(
        "reset_password.html",
        project_name=settings.PROJECT_NAME,
        username=email_to,
        email=email_to,
        valid_hours=valid_hours,
        link=link
    )
    
    return EmailData(html_content=html_content, subject=subject)
results.label: FP

results.name: generate_password_reset_token
results.context:
from datetime import datetime, timedelta, timezone
import jwt
from app.core import security
from app.core.config import settings
results.generated:
expiration = datetime.utcnow() + timedelta(hours=settings.EMAIL_RESET_TOKEN_EXPIRE_HOURS)
    not_before = datetime.utcnow()
    payload = {
        "exp": expiration,
        "nbf": not_before,
        "sub": email
    }
    token = jwt.encode(payload, settings.SECRET_KEY, algorithm=security.ALGORITHM)
    return token
results.label: TP
